groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MULTIPLE CHOICE 73

Questions 21- 25

Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

21 Danny says that doing an internship would demonstrate to a future employer

A his ability to make plans.
B his wide range of experience.
C his critical thinking skills.

22 Why does Sara want to do an internship with a large firm?

A It would enable her to make more contacts.
B She would be more likely to get a position abroad.
C There will be more positions available to choose from.

23 Sara and Danny agree that the best way to select an internship agency is to

A study their website very carefully.
B contact people who have used them.
C pick one that focuses on a particular profession.

24 Danny mentions his cousin to make the point that

A contacts can be helpful when arranging an internship.
B internships can be unrelated to a person’s degree course.
C it is possible to arrange an internship with a company directly.

25 When speaking about remote internships, Danny and Sara disagree about

A how useful it would be to do one.
B what a person might do after completing one.
C whether one could be done during a degree course.

items.prompt_html: Danny says that doing an internship would demonstrate to a future employer

Sara and Danny agree that the best way to select an internship agency is to
